title: gutierrezia spathulata var. gilliesii
intro: Gutierrezia spathulata var. gilliesii, also known as a shrubby species of the snakeweed genus, is a plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its medicinal properties include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Gutierrezia spathulata var. gilliesii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
